---
title: "Advanced Visualization Code"
author: "Sofia Perez"
date: "2026-03-06"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Set up

```{r}
library(tidyverse) # general use
library(here) # file organization
library(janitor) # cleaning data frames
library(readxl) # reading excel files
library(hexbin)
library(ggpattern)
library(ggthemes)
library(magick)
personal_data <- read_csv(here("data",
                               "personal_data_03072026.csv"))

personal_data_clean <- personal_data |> # save personal data as object
  clean_names() |> # clean column names
  mutate(date_mutate = as.Date.character(date, format = "%m/%d/%Y"), # mutate date column into 
         game_min = time_with_mobile_game_active_min,
         class_hrs = time_in_class_lecture_hrs,
         study_hrs = time_spent_in_study_spaces_hrs,
         friends_hrs = time_spent_at_friends_hrs,
         assignments = number_of_assignments_due) |>
  select(date_mutate, game_min, class, class_hrs, study_hrs, friends_hrs, assignments)
```

# Visualization 1.

```{r}
#| label: hexplot
ggplot(data = personal_data,
       aes(x = time_in_class_lecture_hrs,
           y = time_with_mobile_game_active_min)) +
  geom_hex() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# Visualization 2.

```{r}
ggplot(data = personal_data_clean,
       aes(x = class_hrs,
           y = game_min)) + 
  geom_area_pattern(pattern = "gradient",
                    fill = "#00000010",
                    pattern_fill  = "#00000010",
                    pattern_fill2 = "blue")
```

# Visualization 3.

```{r}
ggplot(data = personal_data_clean,
       aes(x = date_mutate,
           y = game_min)) + 
  geom_line()
```
